analysis.reasoning: Core message: A Chinese envoy says Afghanistan’s future arrangements should be broadly representative. This signals China advocating inclusive governance for Afghanistan. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced or implied. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—positioning China as promoting inclusive, representative political arrangements abroad aligns with a cooperative, peace-supporting stance. CH3 (epic history): Not relevant. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not about China’s internal system. CH5 (CCP governance succeeds): No performance claims. CH6 (culture/nature): Not applicable. Conclusion: Only CH2 is promoted.
